title: 阪神大賞典の後に・操縦桿はまだ手の中

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hah! I did it! I won! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heh, now I can...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I wasn't fast enough.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Mayano! Great job! You were totally amazing on
that last stretch!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Hishiama? You came to see me race?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Of course I'd come to support you—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Then can you tell me something?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What's the next race Brian is gonna be in? You
definitely know, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll be... Still haven't had enough, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Of course not. It's like...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't feel the sting of defeat. If anything,
I'd say she's feeling sad.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...And that's terrible. If we're gonna race...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna be so twinkly that it stings.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I remember the first time I met her. Even though
she had just finished a race, she seemed hungry
for more—like it wasn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'll tell you. I've got a hunch it's gonna be
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm fairly certain she wants to compete against
the best racers.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She probably saw the Hanshin Daishoten as the
best route to get there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—a well-established
long-distance race for top-class racers.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list: Got it. Let's go to the spring Tenno Sho.
Got it. Let's go to the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh.. You two sure are something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've come too far to turn back now! I guess
I'll tag along.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Mayano, once we get back, we're going to train
until you're begging to stop! I hope you're ready!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Of course! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we set our sights on the spring Tenno
Sho!
